ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company posting the job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job posting */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the job belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job posting */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., full-time, part-time, internship) */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Minimum experience required for the job */,
  "education_required" TEXT /* Minimum education required for the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job posting */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Required skills for the job */,
  "date_posted" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "skill_category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., programming, engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_skills" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill required */,
  "skill_importance" INTEGER /* Importance of the skill (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "skill_proficiency" TEXT /* Level of proficiency required for the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill the program is for */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "program_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the training program */,
  "program_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the training program */,
  "program_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "user_experience" TEXT /* User's experience in the industry */,
  "user_education" TEXT /* User's education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "job1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first job posting */,
  "job2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second job posting */,
  "difference" INTEGER /* Difference in skills between the two job postings */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_comparisons_job2_id FOREIGN KEY ("job2_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_comparisons_job1_id FOREIGN KEY ("job1_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skill_gaps" (
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill gap */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill with a gap */,
  "gap_size" INTEGER /* Size of the skill gap */,
  "gap_analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the skill gap */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_gaps_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skill_gaps_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "gap_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill gap */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended training program */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_gap_id FOREIGN KEY ("gap_id") REFERENCES skill_gaps ("gap_id")
)
